ocr.text: In the study, the SNA (degrees) for Subgroup 1 (T1) is 81.1 ± 4.6, while Subgroup 1 (T2) shows 80.2 ± 4.5, with a p value of
0.025*. For Subgroup 2 (T1), the SNA is 82.3 ± 4.7 and for Subgroup 2 (T2) it is 81.5 ± 3.9, with a p value of 0.163. The SNB
(degrees) demonstrates 75.3 ± 3.6 for Subgroup 1 (T1) and 76.6 ± 3.9 for Subgroup 1 (T2), yielding a p value of 0.004*. In
Subgroup 2, SNB (T1) is 76.8 ± 3.1 and SNB (T2) is 77.6 ± 2.7, with a p value of 0.061. The ANB (degrees) for Subgroup 1
(T1) is 5.8 ± 2.4, Subgroup 1 (T2) is 3.5 ± 2.2, with a significant p value of 0.000*.
Subgroup 1 (T1)  Subgroup 1 (T2)  p value  Subgroup 2 (T1)  Subgroup 2 (T2)  p value
For Subgroup 2, ANB (T1) is 5.5 ± 2.3 and ANB (T2) is 3.9 ± 2.3, with a p value of 0.002*. The SN-GoMe (degrees) for
Subgroup 1 (T1) is 35 ± 5.9 and for Subgroup 1 (T2) is 34 ± 5.7, with a p value of 0.078, while Subgroup 2 (T1) is 34.4 ± 4.7
and Subgroup 2 (T2) is 34.9 ± 5.4, yielding a p value of 0.364. The A/Olp (mm) measurements are 78.5 ± 3.6 for Subgroup 1
(T1) and 77.7 ± 3.7 for Subgroup 1 (T2) with a p value of 0.119; for Subgroup 2, A/Olp (T1) is 75.5 ± 3.7 and A/Olp (T2) is
75.6 ± 3.6, with a p value of 0.810. The Pg/Olp (mm) for Subgroup 1 (T1) is 80.3 ± 6.1 and for Subgroup 1 (T2) is 82.6 ± 6.8,
with a p value of 0.005*; for Subgroup 2, Pg/Olp (T1) is 77 ± 6.8 and Pg/Olp (T2) is 78 ± 6.4, with a significant p value of
0.027*. The AD1 (mm) values are 21.4 ± 4.2 for Subgroup 1 (T1) and 22.5 ± 3.8 for Subgroup 1 (T2), with a p value of 0.160;
in Subgroup 2, AD1 (T1) is 19.9 ± 3.8 and AD1 (T2) is 20.8 ± 3.7, yielding a p value of 0.067. The AD2 (mm) in Subgroup 1
(T1) is 15.1 ± 3.1 and in Subgroup 1 (T2) is 17.5 ± 3, with a p value of 0.000*; for Subgroup 2, AD2 (T1) is 15.3 ± 2.7 and AD2
(T2) is 16.2 ± 3.2, with a significant p value of 0.009*. The AD-PtV (mm) shows 8 ± 3.5 for Subgroup 1 (T1) and 9.7 ± 3.7 for
Subgroup 1 (T2), with a p value of 0.000*; in Subgroup 2, AD-PtV (T1) is 8.1 ± 2.5 and AD-PtV (T2) is 9 ± 2.5, with a p value
of 0.013*. The OA (mm) values are 11.2 ± 2.3 for Subgroup 1 (T1) and 12.9 ± 2.5 for Subgroup 1 (T2), with a p value of
0.000*; in Subgroup 2, OA (T1) is 10.1 ± 1.9 and OA (T2) is 11 ± 1.8, yielding a p value of 0.168. Finally, the LA (mm)
measurements indicate 11.7 ± 2.2 for Subgroup 1 (T1) and 13.4 ± 2.9 for Subgroup 1 (T2), with a significant p value of 0.000*;
for Subgroup 2, LA (T1) is 12.2 ± 2.8 and LA (T2) is 13.2 ± 2.8, with a p value of 0.061.
